_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

_contextSnippet: γH2AX (green) was immunolabeled as a marker of DNA damage...(*) indicates a significant difference as compared to the DMSO control, p < 0.005
details: Successfully detected DNA damage in Y100 treated cells, with quantification showing significant difference compared to DMSO control (p < 0.005)
